job_title: Internal Audit - New York - Associate, Data Analytics - 3765660

weaknesses: No stated CI/CD pipeline or Docker usage

improvement_bullets: Developed and deployed automated audit testing scripts using Python, incorporating Machine Learning algorithms (Random Forest, Clustering) to identify anomalies and patterns in high-volume financial datasets.
Integrated Continuous Monitoring (CI/CD) pipelines within Git workflows to ensure high-quality, production-ready code for automated data reporting and risk assessment tools.
Applied statistical rigor to audit planning by utilizing descriptive statistics and regression analysis to build predictive data distribution models, facilitating proactive risk assessment.
Implemented NLP techniques using Python to extract and categorize key information from unstructured audit documentation, improving document review efficiency by 30%.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to execute audit engagements, ensuring compliance with firm-wide standards while utilizing SQL to facilitate ad-hoc analysis for population re-performance testing.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Internal Audit - New York - Associate, Data Analytics - 3765660 opportunity with Goldman Sachs. I am interested in this opportunity because of Goldman Sachs' reputation for setting the global standard in financial risk management and the firm's dedication to leveraging cutting-edge analytics to maintain rigorous audit integrity. What interests me about working for Goldman Sachs is its proactive approach to digital transformation within the Audit division, which inspires me because I am passionate about applying data-driven solutions to complex regulatory challenges. I believe my expertise in Python-based automation and my proficiency in building robust data models would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex performance data into clear, actionable audit insights. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed interactive dashboards to replace manual reporting, identifying high-value customer segments through time series modeling. This initiative resulted in a 300% increase in customer acquisition and significantly reduced the time spent on manual data processing, a result I am eager to replicate in your audit testing workflows. Ultimately, I know that the Internal Audit - New York - Associate, Data Analytics - 3765660 role at Goldman Sachs would allow me to bring my experience in SQL and Python-driven ETL pipelines to improve operational efficiency and the effectiveness of audit testing. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my Agile and SDLC best practices skills. During my time there, I collaborated with Underwriting and Product teams to align software features with business objectives, using JIRA for project tracking and Git for version control, which reduced project delivery delays by 25%. I am excited by the opportunity to use my machine learning and statistical modeling skills in working on continuous monitoring and risk assessment at Goldman Sachs. I know that my technical versatility and analytical mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Internal Audit - New York - Associate, Data Analytics - 3765660 role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
